codeReview.summary: The feature adds duplicate-material validation to the PO create form and expands tests to comprehensively cover VAL-P2P-001 through VAL-P2P-004. The code change is minimal (9 lines) but correct, and the 40 new tests provide thorough coverage of supplier lifecycle gating, PO line validation, and state-machine action visibility. All tests pass.

summary: PASS. The implementation correctly adds duplicate rawMaterialId detection to PurchaseOrdersPage.tsx using a Set-based tracking approach. The test suite was completely rewritten with 40 tests covering: (1) VAL-P2P-001 supplier required-field enforcement and create flow, (2) VAL-P2P-002 status-gated lifecycle actions (approve/activate/suspend) with confirmation dialogs and list refresh, (3) VAL-P2P-003 active-supplier-only dropdown, line validation (blank, non-positive, duplicate), and (4) VAL-P2P-004 PO state-machine action visibility by status (DRAFT/APPROVED/INVOICED), void reason capture, timeline access, and post-action list refresh. All 40 tests pass. No blocking issues found.
